name: Sparda
description:
Sparda from Devil May Cry but in Dead by Daylight as a survivor? Done on request. :^)

I'm no expert on DBD so there will be edits in the future, but the request was from a friend. :P

**!!WARNING!!**
DBD is a *horror* game and a (currently vauge) killer is featured, I do not currently have anything specifically set for this killer and thus I do not know the extent that this killer will go. The main focus is interacting with Sparda though, so it hopefully won't be too bad? 

It's pretty open for you to use whatever killer you want honestly. ^-^
creator: Ronax_Obscure
